description: AutoRAG pipeline: load test data, discover and extract documents, prepare search space, optimize RAG templates, build leaderboard.

components.description: Download benchmark test data from S3 and sample records for evaluation.

stages.description: Validate bucket/path inputs and S3 credentials.
Download test JSON from S3 and validate benchmark schema.
Write sampled test data to the output artifact.

components.description: List input documents in S3 and write a documents descriptor manifest.

stages.description: Validate S3 credentials and input parameters.
List objects in the input prefix and apply sampling rules.
Write documents_descriptor.json to the output artifact.

components.description: Download listed documents and extract text with docling.

stages.description: Load documents_descriptor.json and validate S3 credentials.
Download source documents, run docling extraction, and write output artifacts.

components.description: Prepare the AutoRAG search space and model pre-selection report.

stages.description: Validate inputs and OGX client configuration.
Run search-space preparation and model pre-selection.
Write search_space_prep_report.yml to the output artifact.

components.description: Run ai4rag optimization and emit RAG pattern artifacts.

stages.description: Validate optimization settings and input artifacts.
Execute RAG template optimization with ai4rag.
Write pattern directories, metrics, and notebooks.

components.description: Build HTML leaderboard from optimized RAG pattern scores.

stages.description: Aggregate pattern metrics and render leaderboard HTML.
